narrative:
Defiance County has 25,777 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.3% of registrants.
